title: Plan-and-Execute Patterns
description: Master plan-and-execute patterns to structure long-running agentic workflows. Decouple high-level task planning from low-level execution to improve the reliability and transparency of agent operations.
objectives: Master plan-and-execute patterns to structure long-running agentic workflows.
Decouple high-level task planning from low-level execution to improve the reliability and transparency of agent operations.
